notFound.title: 404 - Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

goneWrong.title: Something went wrong
goneWrong.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

alertError.title: Error
alertError.description: An error occurred. Please try again.

error.title: Login Failed
error.description: An error occurred during login. Please try again.

header.title: Welcome back!
header.description: Please enter your credentials to log in.

error.title: Registration Failed
error.description: An error occurred during registration. Please try again.
error.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters long
error.usernameInvalid: Username must be alphanumeric with underscores only
error.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
error.passwordInvalid: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number

header.title: Create Your Account
header.description: Enter your details below to get started.

profilePage.title: My profile
profilePage.description: Manage your account details and review the quizzes you have created.

error.title: Profile unavailable
error.description: We couldn't load your profile details right now.

overview.title: Profile overview
overview.description: Basic account information from your Quizate profile.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.description: Update the basic details attached to your account.
settings.usernameHelp: This is the name other users will see on your quizzes.
settings.emailHelp: Adding an email helps with account recovery and notifications.

error.title: Update failed
error.description: We couldn't save your profile changes.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Use a strong password to keep your account secure.
password.currentPasswordHelp: Enter your existing password to confirm this change.
password.newPasswordHelp: Use at least 8 characters with upper, lower, and numeric characters.

quizzes.title: My quizzes
quizzes.description: A quick look at the quizzes you have created.
quizzes.noDescription: No description provided for this quiz.

empty.title: No quizzes yet
empty.description: Your quizzes will appear here after you create one.

error.title: Couldn't load quizzes
error.description: Please try again in a moment.

hero.title: Pick a quiz and start playing in seconds.
hero.description: Browse public quizzes from the community, open the details page, and jump straight into the questions.

list.title: Quiz library
list.creator: Creator
list.noDescription: No description provided for this quiz.

empty.title: No public quizzes yet
empty.description: Check back soon. Public quizzes will appear here as soon as people publish them.

createQuizPage.title: Create a quiz
createQuizPage.description: Put together a multiple-choice quiz, arrange the questions with drag and drop, and send it live when it is ready.

metadata.title: Quiz details
metadata.description: Set the core information people will see before they start answering.
metadata.descriptionHelp: Keep it short and useful so players know what they are about to answer.
metadata.topicsHelp: Separate topics with commas. You can also tap an existing topic below.

questions.title: Questions
questions.description: Add as many multiple-choice questions as you want and reorder them with the mouse.
questions.questionDescription: Each question must have exactly one correct answer.

options.title: Answer options
options.description: Reorder options with the mouse and mark exactly one as correct.

summary.title: Quiz summary
summary.description: A quick check before you create the quiz.

actions.title: Publish
actions.description: Create the quiz now or reset the draft and start over.

error.title: Quiz creation failed
error.description: We couldn't create your quiz right now.

validation.optionMin: Each question needs at least two options

quizDetailsPage.noDescription: No description provided for this quiz.
quizDetailsPage.noTopics: No topics were added for this quiz yet.

actions.helper: You can take this quiz without logging in. Your score will be shown as soon as you finish.

overview.title: About this quiz
overview.description: Review the quiz details before you begin answering.
overview.creator: Creator

ready.title: Before you start
ready.description: A quick summary of what to expect from this quiz.

quizTakePage.description: Choose one answer for each question and submit when you are ready.

progress.title: Your progress
progress.description: You can submit at any time. Unanswered questions will count as incorrect.

empty.title: No questions available
empty.description: This quiz does not have any questions to answer yet.

results.title: Your results
results.description: Here is your score and a review of every question.
results.summary: Check how many answers you got right and review the correct choices below.
results.unanswered: You did not answer this question.
